name: zvideo_fx_set_surface_state
description: zVideo::Fx_SetSurfaceState caches the active FX surface pixels, dimensions, byte pitch, and 16-bit pixel pitch.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x48d420 validates writes to g_zVideo_FxSurfaceWidth, g_zVideo_FxSurfaceHeight, g_zVideo_FxSurfacePitchBytes, g_zVideo_FxSurfacePixels16, and signed pitchBytes / 2 into g_zVideo_FxSurfacePitchPixels16.

The native postprocess smoke reaches zVideo::Fx_SetSurfaceState through zVideo::RunPostprocessOnSwBuffer and verifies the resulting FX surface pixels, width, height, byte pitch, and 16-bit pixel pitch.
binary_safe_evidence: VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison passed for ?Fx_SetSurfaceState@zVideo@@YIXPAXHHH@Z at 0x48d420 with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 20 relocation bytes; 5 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
